interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 1
interviews.description: Authentication vs Authorization, 401/403, SecurityFilterChain temel davranislari

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 2
interviews.description: Stateful/stateless, session policy, CSRF/CORS ve request-state etkileri

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 4
interviews.description: JWT yapisi, claimler, imza algoritmalari ve token validation kurallari

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 5
interviews.description: Access/refresh token tasarimi, rotation, revocation, logout stratejileri

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 6
interviews.description: JWT filter, SecurityContextHolder, filter order ve hata akislari

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 7
interviews.description: OAuth2, Authorization Code + PKCE, Resource vs Authorization Server

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 8
interviews.description: RBAC, role vs authority, @PreAuthorize ve method security desenleri

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 9
interviews.description: Security hardening, token storage, key rotation, brute-force ve operasyonel guvenlik

interviews.title: Spring Security Interview - 10
interviews.description: Test, troubleshooting, MockMvc, @WithMockUser ve production debug yaklasimlari
